lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Ship database — comparative hull stats and hardpoint loadouts behind the combat suitability ranking.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Combat
sources.what: Combat career roles (bounty hunting, conflict zones) the suitability ratings target.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Bounty Hunter
sources.what: RES / Nav-Beacon / CZ engagement context behind the per-hull verdicts.
